recommendations.rationale: Strong one-day bounce, but still in a downtrend and below key moving averages; wait for confirmation before upgrading.
evidence: Closed at 496.6 HKD, up 2.603% on the day
Below ma20 of 519.28 and ma60 of 557.41
60-day range position is low at 0.0991
Volume ratio versus 20-day average is muted at 0.7078
risks: Bounce may be a counter-trend move inside an established downtrend
Internet-platform theme remains below medium-term trend
recommendations.invalidation: Upgrade only if price reclaims the ma20 with improving volume; turn more defensive if it breaks below the recent 60-day low area.

recommendations.rationale: Alibaba led the watchlist on the day, but trend and volume evidence are not strong enough for a buy call.
evidence: Closed at 122.7 HKD, up 3.109% on the day
Ranked as the top leader in the market snapshot
Below ma20 of 127.905 and ma60 of 146.7767
60-day range position is very low at 0.0679
Volume ratio versus 20-day average is 0.7136
risks: Largest daily gain may reflect short-covering rather than durable accumulation
Low range position signals weak recent structure
recommendations.invalidation: Upgrade only on a sustained move above ma20 with volume expansion; avoid chasing if it fails near 124-128 HKD resistance.

recommendations.rationale: Xiaomi lagged the risk-on bounce and remains near the bottom of its 60-day range, so evidence supports observation rather than action.
evidence: Closed at 32.02 HKD, up only 0.819% on the day
Listed among laggards in the market snapshot
Below ma20 of 33.348 and ma60 of 35.138
60-day range position is 0.0567
Volume ratio versus 20-day average is 0.811
risks: Relative weakness versus internet-platform names and tech ETFs
Low range position could precede further downside if support fails
recommendations.invalidation: Stay watch-only unless it reclaims ma20 and improves relative strength; turn avoid if it breaks below the 31.58 HKD intraday low with weak market breadth.

recommendations.rationale: Broad-market ETF is closest to ma20 and less depressed than tech names, but the broader regime remains below trend.
evidence: Closed at 25.54 HKD, up 1.834% on the day
Close is near ma20 of 25.634 but below ma60 of 26.4957
60-day range position is 0.2414, higher than the tech-heavy names
Volume ratio versus 20-day average is 0.8615
Regime flag is downtrend
risks: Failure to reclaim ma20 could confirm continued broad-market weakness
Broad ETF may lag if rebound is concentrated in technology leaders
recommendations.invalidation: Upgrade only if it holds above ma20 and market breadth improves; downgrade if it loses 25.08 HKD on rising volume.

recommendations.rationale: Among weak-trend assets, this has the best confirmation: it led ETFs on the day and traded above average volume, but entry still needs confirmation because trend is down.
evidence: Closed at 4.646 HKD, up 2.11% on the day
Listed among market leaders
Volume ratio versus 20-day average is elevated at 1.1489
Still below ma20 of 4.7969 and ma60 of 5.2082
60-day range position remains low at 0.0787
risks: Downtrend flag remains active despite the rebound
Low range position means the setup is early and fragile
Hang Seng Tech exposure may reverse sharply if risk appetite fades
recommendations.invalidation: Do not act if it fails to reclaim or hold above the ma20; invalidate the candidate setup on a close back below 4.602 HKD.

recommendations.rationale: Same theme as 3033 but weaker confirmation due to lower relative volume; prefer watching rather than duplicating exposure.

risks: Duplicative Hang Seng Tech exposure could amplify drawdowns
